Title: roadmap.sh
Notes: Interactive visual roadmaps for frontend, backend, DevOps and more. Best starting point for figuring out what to learn next.

Title: MDN Web Docs
Notes: The authoritative reference for HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Browser compatibility tables are invaluable.

Title: CS50: Introduction to Computer Science
Notes: Harvard's free intro CS course. Covers C, Python, SQL, and web development. Exceptional production quality.

Title: The Missing Semester of Your CS Education
Notes: MIT course on shell, vim, git, debugging, and profiling — the practical skills most CS programs skip.

Title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
Notes: Martin Kleppmann's book on distributed systems and databases. Essential reading before any system design interview.

Title: Hussein Nasser on YouTube
Notes: Deep dives into backend engineering: databases, protocols, Kafka, PostgreSQL internals. Technical and clear.

Title: web.dev
Notes: Google's resource for modern web best practices. Strong coverage of Core Web Vitals and performance optimization.

Title: Fireship
Notes: 100-second concept overviews and longer project tutorials. Best channel for staying current with the JS ecosystem.
